top_signals.title: Accredited official statistics: GDP deflators at market prices, and money GDP June 2026 (Quarterly National Accounts)
top_signals.summary: This document contains the latest gross domestic product (GDP) deflators. The GDP deflator can be viewed as a measure of general inflation in the domestic economy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Wang Yi Says China Welcomes Stronger European Business Relations
top_signals.summary: China welcomes deeper cooperation with Swedish and European businesses, which will benefit all parties involved, Foreign Minister Wang Yi said in a meeting with Investor AB Chairman Jacob Wallenberg in Stockholm on July 4, according to a statement from the ministry on Sunday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK and France agree with Oman to ensure safety of its territorial waters
top_signals.summary: France said it has deployed mine countermeasures to the Middle East, including two mine-hunting ships.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board's annual bank stress test confirms that large banks are well positioned to weather a severe recession and able to continue to lend to households and businesses
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Bank of Eufaula and S N B Bancshares, Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: From Macron to Modi, governments are rolling out the red carpet for AI giants
top_signals.summary: Macron and Modi are courting tech CEOs as France and India seek AI data center investment and cloud infrastructure.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Corporate report: Whole of Government Accounts 2025 to 2026: guidance for preparers
top_signals.summary: Guidance for central government and local government preparers for Whole of Government Accounts.
